name: WLF_INTERNET_ACCOUNTS
description: Table to store the internet account (e.g., Email, Calendar, etc.,) details.

columns.Name: INTERNET_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.Comments: System generate unique identifier.

columns.Name: ACCOUNT_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique code assigned to each account.

columns.Name: ACCOUNT_NAME
columns.Comments: Specifies account name (e.g, Quotation from Supplier, Supplier Recall Letter, etc.,)

columns.Name: FAMILY
columns.Comments: Specifies the product family associated with the internet account.

columns.Name: PRODUCT
columns.Comments: Specifies the product associated with the internet account.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Describes the internet account.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Lookup code that specifies if the account is active or not (e.g., ACTIVE/INACTIVE).

columns.Name: USERNAME
columns.Comments: Specifies username (e.g., Email Address) of the internet account.

columns.Name: PROVIDER_CODE
columns.Comments: Lookup code that specifies the provider. (e.g., GMAIL/MSGRAPH).

columns.Name: CLIENT_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies the Client ID associated with the internet account.

columns.Name: TENANT_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies the Tenant ID associated with the internet account.

columns.Name: AGENT_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Specifies if the connection is enabled to be invoked from AI agents (e.g., Y/N).

columns.Name: HYBRID_SEARCH_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Specifies if the emails from this account should be vectorized for hybrid search

columns.Name: POLL_INTERVAL
columns.Comments: Defines how frequently the system polls the email inbox for new messages.

columns.Name: ADDITIONAL_INFO
columns.Comments: Used to specify any additional information about the account.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
